name: Rokeach instrumental values
description: Preferred modes of conduct commonly associated with the Rokeach Value Survey.
citation: Rokeach, M. (1973). The Nature of Human Values. Free Press.
licenseNote: Common value labels with new paraphrases; no proprietary administration or scoring materials included.

values.name: Ambitious
values.definition: Working hard and aspiring toward consequential goals.

values.name: Broad-minded
values.definition: Remaining open to unfamiliar ideas and perspectives.

values.name: Courageous
values.definition: Standing up for convictions despite risk.

values.name: Helpful
values.definition: Working for the welfare of others.

values.name: Independent
values.definition: Relying on one's own judgment and action.

values.name: Loyal
values.definition: Remaining faithful to people and commitments.
